opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My left side has been heavy for months, but tonight a sharp, tearing pain started under my ribs, and I am sweating completely through my clothes.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The dull dragging feeling on my left side turned into a sudden sharp tearing pain a few hours ago, and now I've got fevers and I'm drenched in sweat and it hurts more when I breathe in.

symptom_narrative.onset: the sharp pain started about 6 hours ago; the heaviness and fullness on the left has been building for months
symptom_narrative.duration: 6 hours for the acute pain; about 8 months of fatigue, fullness and weight loss
symptom_narrative.character: a sharp, tearing pain under the left ribs on top of a long-standing dull dragging fullness; also deep aching in both thighs
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the sharp pain is severe and I can't get comfortable; I'm holding a pillow against my side
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: under the left ribs, spreading up to the left shoulder; the fullness is across the whole left upper belly
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the fullness has been constant for months; the sharp pain came on suddenly tonight and hasn't let up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — I took paracetamol and it did nothing at all
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: taking a deep breath, moving or twisting
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: drenching night sweats, feeling hot and feverish, extreme tiredness, no appetite and filling up after just a few bites, deep aching in my thighs, and some bruises on my legs I didn't notice happening
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no sudden pain like this before, but the tiredness and left-sided fullness have been slowly getting worse
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can barely move without the pain flaring; I've lost about 8 kg without trying and I feel wiped out all the time

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: generally 'run down' and increasingly tired over the last 8 months, no formal diagnosis given to me

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: took some tonight for the pain

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with spouse who is present and helping; very distressed by the pain and the amount of sweating

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer; technique and calibration unknown

objective_data_offered.value: drenched in sweat, soaked completely through his clothes and the bedding
looks very pale and washed out
several new bruises have come up on the legs without any injury
the left upper belly feels hard, full and swollen and has for months
lost about 8 kg without trying over the last few months
